tracks.rawText: 3:22XJN5000 (Riding Dirty)v5.5CoverQuietest-possible dark reggae trap dub: sub-muted 808 bass slides under a soft one-drop kick, ghosted rim clicks, brushed snare, and sparse hi-hat ticks with tiny rolls, Dub delays, spring reverb, tape echo, and low-pass filtered synth stabs create a hushed, smoke-filled texture, with an airy high-pitched operatic vocal sample and restrained rap delivery1PublishRemix
